summary: The agent concluded that fluoridation through replacement of phosphate ions contributes more effectively to strengthening dental structures while preserving their overall stability versus direct hydrogen bonding disruption caused by hydroxyl substitutions. Thus, option C was selected as correct based on this analysis. Agent2 determined that substituting phosphate ions with fluoride results in greater material reinforcement without compromising the fundamental architecture of hydroxyapatite relative to when hydroxyl groups are replaced; hence, they chose Option C accordingly.

Answer choice: C
